_meta.description: Complete VFX specification for all Cocos Creator particle effects in Glow Island

effects.label: Connection Path Light Trail
effects.description: Small bright warm-white particles emitted along the connection path when two tiles are successfully linked.

trigger_conditions.description: Fired by MatchEngine when two same-type tiles are connected via a valid path. Spawn one instance per matched pair at the midpoint of the connection path.

integration_notes.spawn_strategy: Instantiate ParticleSystem2D node at path midpoint; set position to connection center; play once (duration=0.15s); auto-destroy on finish.
integration_notes.position_follow: Optionally place particles along path segments at equal intervals for a chain effect.

chapter_color_overrides.note: Tint startColor to match chapter special_color for chapter-themed light trails.

performance.note: Each match spawns 1 instance; max 4 considering rapid consecutive matches. Low particle count (20) keeps GPU cost negligible.

effects.label: Tile Elimination Star Burst
effects.description: Burst of golden sparkles on tile elimination. Intensity (particle count and size) scales with the current combo multiplier level.

trigger_conditions.description: Fired by MatchEngine each time a tile pair is eliminated. The current comboCount is passed as parameter to determine burst intensity.

integration_notes.spawn_strategy: Instantiate at tile center; set totalParticles and startSize dynamically from combo_scaling table before play(); auto-destroy on finish.
integration_notes.dynamic_params: Use ps.totalParticles = comboScale.total_particles; ps.startSize = comboScale.start_size; before ps.resetSystem().

chapter_color_overrides.note: Override startColor with chapter accent for combo bursts that feel native to each chapter.

performance.note: Combo-4 burst uses 120 particles; limit concurrent bursts to 8 instances. Pool and recycle nodes.

effects.label: Ambient Fireflies / Flower Petals
effects.description: Gentle continuously looping floating particles (fireflies or flower petals) played during island area restoration. Duration is infinite until manually stopped.

trigger_conditions.description: Fired by IslandRestoreManager when an area's restoration animation sequence starts. Stop on AreaRestoreComplete.

integration_notes.spawn_strategy: Instantiate persistent node on the restoring area; call ps.play() on AreaRestoreBegin; call ps.stopSystem() on AreaRestoreComplete; fade out over 0.5s then destroy.
integration_notes.position_note: positionType=1 (relative) — parent node to the area tile group so particles float in area-local space.
integration_notes.color_variant: Use moccasin (#FFE4B5) startColor for day/warm chapters (1–4), pale green (#98FB98) startColor for natural/forest themes (chapter 4–5), deep-sky tones for chapter 6.

chapter_color_overrides.note: Swap startColor to match each chapter's restore aesthetic.

performance.note: Low emission rate (12/s) and 25 total particles keeps this lightweight for ambient use. Cap at 3 concurrent restoration areas.

effects.label: Lighthouse Chapter Climax Light Effect
effects.description: Full-screen dramatic light rays expanding outward from the lighthouse beacon. Deep blue transitions to bright gold. Chapter 6 exclusive climax effect.

trigger_conditions.description: Fired by IslandRestoreManager specifically for Chapter 6 final lighthouse restoration. Plays once during the area-restore-sequence climax beat.

integration_notes.spawn_strategy: Instantiate at lighthouse beacon world position (screen center); set z-order to tile_effect layer (z=30); play once (5.0s); auto-destroy on finish. Coordinate with lighthouse_beam_rotation (period=4.0s from art-tokens).
integration_notes.layering: Place above board (z_index.tile_effect=30) but below HUD (z_index.hud=40) so it doesn't obscure score/steps.
integration_notes.screen_shake: Companion CameraShake component triggers on this effect start: amplitude=8px, duration=0.6s, easing=ease-out.

chapter_color_overrides.note: This effect is Chapter 6 exclusive; no overrides needed. Color palette directly sourced from art-tokens.colors.chapters[5] (id=6): primary=#2D4A7A, accent=#FFD700.

performance.note: 60 particles with large size and 5s life; only 1 instance ever plays (chapter 6 final moment). Pre-warm disabled to preserve dramatic first-frame impact.

global_notes.file_format: cc.ParticleAsset JSON — compatible with Cocos Creator 3.x ParticleSystem2D asset loader
global_notes.pooling_recommendation: Use cc.NodePool for vfx-tile-connect and vfx-combo-burst; these are high-frequency. vfx-area-restore and vfx-lighthouse-final are low-frequency and can be instantiate/destroy.

z_ordering.exception: vfx-lighthouse-final may be elevated to z=35 (board_event layer) for full-screen drama

global_notes.color_override_api: Set ps.startColor = new cc.Color(r, g, b, a) before ps.resetSystem() to apply chapter tinting at runtime.
